Bilingual Assholes Total: Expletive Task Graphs

morgan moyer

2026-05-12

Summary Stats

agr <- d %>% 
  group_by(Valence) %>% 
  summarize(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse),
            SD = sd(SliderResponse))
print(agr)
## # A tibble: 2 × 3
##   Valence MeanAcceptability    SD
##   <chr>               <dbl> <dbl>
## 1 neg                  54.0  34.1
## 2 pos                  71.7  28.4
agr <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(ContextCondition,Nativeness) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=ContextCondition,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Nativeness)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

agr <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Nativeness,ContextCondition,LexicalType) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=LexicalType,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Nativeness)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ContextCondition) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

agr <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Nativeness,Valence,ContextCondition,LexicalType) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=LexicalType,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Nativeness)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  facet_grid(Valence~ContextCondition) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

L2 Only

agr <- d %>% 
  filter(Nativeness == "L2") %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Valence,ContextCondition) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=ContextCondition,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Valence)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  # facet_wrap(~LexicalType) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

agr <- d %>% 
  filter(Nativeness == "L2") %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Valence,ContextCondition,LexicalType) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=LexicalType,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Valence)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ContextCondition) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )
